title: Crossbow Cartridges
description: Shoot more than just arrows! Crossbow Cartridges allows your crossbow to fire a variety of projectiles; Shoot Pufferfish, Tripwires, Torches, and many more.
body: # Crossbow Cartridges by Gamemode 4 Shoot more than just arrows! Crossbow Cartridges allows your crossbow to fire a variety of projectiles; Shoot Pufferfish, Tripwires, Torches, and many more ### Features - Hold new projectiles in your offhand to shoot them from your crossbow - Shoot fish buckets, splash potions, tnt, fire charges, torches and string! - Adds two new crossbow advancements ### More Info [ **Watch on Youtube**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XJiGvX7l-pI) [ **Read the Wiki**](https://wiki.gm4.co/wiki/Crossbow_Cartridges) ### Credits - Creators: [Denniss](https://github.com/Dennis-0), [Nik3141](https://youtube.com/channel/UCgKd6elt0L3w-d7ryLw-7HQ) - Icon Design: [Sparks](https://bsky.app/profile/selcouthsparks.bsky.social) --- ## About Gamemode 4 Gamemode 4 is a series of command-powered creations that are designed to change and enhance the survival experience. All of our modules are designed to work together flawlessly, and are balanced for usage in a survival setting. Pick and choose your favorites from our [website](https://gm4.co), or wherever you get datapacks.
